title: Quantum Dynamics
text:
Here is the equation we discussed: \[
i\hbar\frac{\partial}{\partial t} \Psi(\mathbf{r},t) = \hat{H} \Psi(\mathbf{r},t)
\]
This was proven by Smith (Reyes Hung 2023).





References

Reyes Hung, Maykoll Anthonny. 2023. “Exploration of possible signals beyond special relativity using high-energy astroparticle physics.” PhD thesis, U. Zaragoza (main). https://arxiv.org/abs/2307.03462.
